title: Xpeng Q3 2025 Earnings: Lowest Quarterly Loss in 5 Years
text: Xpeng achieved a significant milestone in its earnings report, posting its smallest quarterly loss in five years. The electric vehicle maker reported a net loss of RMB 380 million ($50 million) in Q3 2025, representing substantial improvement compared to prior periods. The company demonstrated dramatic year-over-year improvement, with losses declining 78.93% from the RMB 1.81 billion loss recorded in Q3 2024. On a non-GAAP basis, losses narrowed to just RMB 150 million, approaching breakeven. This marks the eighth consecutive quarter of year-over-year loss reduction, with management targeting quarterly profitability by Q4 2025. Q3 deliveries reached 116,007 vehicles, the fourth consecutive quarterly record. Revenue surged to RMB 20.38 billion, a 101.8% increase year-over-year. Vehicle sales climbed 105.3%, while service and other revenue reached RMB 2.33 billion, up 78.1 percent year-over-year. Gross margin improved significantly to 20.1%, up from 15.3% in the prior year period.
